description: Composition Beige trousers made of 100% washed, that has flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, brand tab appliqued on the upper right pocket, plastic button and zipper closure on the front and loops on the waist to secure a belt Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash gentle Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Avoid soaking, remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on prints or embellishments Upgrade your casual style with these beige pants from belmonte. The pure cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the classic cut of the trousers makes it perfect for everyday wear. Team these with slim fit shirts and leather slip-ons for a laid back look. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 44" Height-6.3”, Waist – 32”
